case_title: MORGAN, GARRETT VS SHAKESPERE, DAVID MICHAEL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORGAN, GARRETT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAKESPERE, DAVID MICHAEL $700.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $722.00, JUDGMENT TO BE PAID BY DEFENDANT TO PLAINTIFF BY MAY 1, 2004. PLAINTIFF TO RETURN THE 1987 VW SCIROCCO, VIN WVWCB053JHK014230, TO DEFENDANT AT HIS HOME AT 2852 GOLDEN GATE AVE. SF CALIF. BY MAY 1, 2004. PARTIES TO NOTIFY THE COURT OF ANY NON-COMPLIANCE BY APPEARANCE ON MAY 10, 2004 AT 3:30PM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $760.00 FILED BY MORGAN, GARRETT AS TO DEFENDANT SHAKESPERE, DAVID MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-08-2004 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORGAN, GARRETT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SHAKESPERE, DAVID MICHAEL JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27570 ON 5/13/04 EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION ( $89 IS PAID TO THE DEFENDANT). RESCISSION IS NOT ORDERED BECAUSE PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PRESEVUE THE VECHICLE 1987 SCIROCCO VIN # WVWCB053JHK014230. SHOULD PLAINTIFF DECIDE TO COMPLETE THE TRANSFER OF RECORD OWNERSHIP TO PLAINTIFF, DEFENDANT SHALL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHAKESPERE, DAVID MICHAEL
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT SHAKESPERE, DAVID MICHAEL
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 27570, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
